name: Snowdrift Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place egg whites, sugar, water, cream of tartar, syrup and vanilla essence in a large bowl. Whisk together until thick and smooth.
2. Whip double cream until softly stiff and fold into egg white mixture.
3. Fold in soured cream, liqueur and cherries.
4. Pour into a freezer container and freeze until half frozen.
5. Stir with a fork, breaking up ice crystals.
6. Cover and freeze until firm.
